summary.key_theme: 公司面臨嚴重的法律訴訟與合規危機，因涉嫌規避出口管制向中國銷售伺服器，導致股價重挫並引發市場對其長期營運與聲譽的擔憂。

bullish.title: Why Super Micro Stock Popped On Wednesday — SMCI Stock Surges as Hardware Sector Rallies
bullish.reason: 受惠於整體硬體類股的反彈，顯示在極端利空下仍有部分買盤進場試圖搶反彈。

bullish.title: Why Are Super Micro Computer Shares Surging On Wednesday? — SMCI stock ticks higher in Wednesday premarket.
bullish.reason: 盤前交易時段出現短暫技術性買盤，反映市場對其 AI 伺服器長期需求仍存有一絲期待。

bearish.title: Super Micro Computer Hit With Securities Fraud Lawsuit Amid Alleged China Sales Cover-Up And Nvidia Chip Smuggling Scandal
bearish.reason: 公司面臨證券詐欺集體訴訟，指控其隱瞞對中國銷售伺服器及規避出口管制，嚴重損害投資人信心與公司治理形象。

bearish.title: Citi Slashes Its Super Micro Stock Price Target by 35% Amid ‘Reputation Risks.’
bearish.reason: 花旗銀行因應聯邦起訴帶來的聲譽風險，將目標價大幅下調 35 %，直接衝擊市場估值模型。

bearish.title: Why Super Micro Computer (SMCI) Is Down 29.5% After Indictment Over Alleged China AI Server Exports
bearish.reason: 共同創辦人 Wally Liaw 等人遭起訴，導致股價單日重挫近 30 %，顯示市場對高層涉案的恐慌。

bearish.title: Reddit Sentiment on SMCI Collapsed From 82 to 12 in Three Weeks as Legal Crisis Deepens
bearish.reason: 散戶情緒指標大幅崩跌，顯示市場信心已從樂觀轉為極度悲觀，不利於股價支撐。

bearish.title: Super Micro Computer (SMCI) Registers a Bigger Fall Than the Market: Important Facts to Note
bearish.reason: 股價表現顯著弱於大盤，反映出該公司特有的法律風險已成為壓制股價的主要因素。

neutral.title: Super Micro Computer Option Alert: Apr 2 $24 Calls Sweep
neutral.reason: 出現選擇權買單掃貨，顯示部分投機者在股價大跌後進行避險或博弈反彈，對股價趨勢無明確方向指引。

neutral.title: SMCI vs. TTMI: Which AI Infrastructure Stock is a Better Buy?
neutral.reason: 將 SMCI 與同業進行比較，探討 AI 基礎設施投資機會，屬於中性的投資建議分析。
